title: Update onboarding wizard
description: Revised onboarding screens to improve alignment and text truncation on smaller devices (iPhone SE, Galaxy S22). Added new illustration assets.

title: Implement push notification batching
description: Group notifications by type and deliver in batches every 30 minutes to reduce background wakeups and battery usage. Added coarse-grained control in settings.

title: Social login integration
description: Add social login with Google and Apple. The feature is deployed on staging environment at stg-app.internal:8443 and uses auth token sk_live_abc123 for testing. Awaiting QA sign-off.

title: Fix crash on profile page
description: Resolve NullPointerException when user has no avatar set. Also improve error handling for missing profile data from network.
